interfaces.name: getHomepageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the homepage including primary actions and featured exhibits, programs, articles, and shop items.

interfaces.name: getVisitorInfo
interfaces.description: Get visitor information including opening hours, location, access, and visitor tips for the Visit & Tickets page.

interfaces.name: getAdmissionAvailability
interfaces.description: Get ticket types and admission timeslot availability for a given visit date for the Tickets & Hours section.

parameters.name: visit_date
parameters.description: Visit date in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format

interfaces.name: createAdmissionBooking
interfaces.description: Create a general admission booking for a selected timeslot and ticket quantities, and optionally add it to the cart/visit summary.

parameters.name: timeslot_id
parameters.description: ID of the selected AdmissionTimeslot

parameters.name: adult_count
parameters.description: Number of adult tickets

parameters.name: child_6_12_count
parameters.description: Number of child (ages 6–12) tickets

parameters.name: child_count
parameters.description: Number of child tickets (other age ranges, if used)

parameters.name: senior_count
parameters.description: Number of senior tickets

parameters.name: add_to_cart
parameters.description: If true, add this admission booking into the unified cart as a cart item

interfaces.name: getCartSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current unified cart / visit summary, including tickets, programs, shop products, shipping options, and totals.

selected_shipping_option_id.description: ID of the currently selected ShippingOption, if any

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a specific cart item in the unified cart.

parameters.name: cart_item_id
parameters.description: ID of the CartItem to update

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: New quantity for this cart item

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a specific item from the unified cart.

parameters.name: cart_item_id
parameters.description: ID of the CartItem to remove

interfaces.name: selectShippingOption
interfaces.description: Select a shipping option for the current cart, used for physical products in the shop.

parameters.name: shipping_option_id
parameters.description: ID of the ShippingOption selected for this cart

interfaces.name: getExhibitFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for browsing exhibits on the Exhibitions page.

interfaces.name: listExhibits
interfaces.description: List exhibits with filters and sorting for the Exhibitions page.

max_estimated_visit_time_minutes.description: Maximum estimated visit time in minutes

is_active_only.description: If true, return only active exhibits

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sorting key, e.g., 'visit_time_asc', 'visit_time_desc', 'title_asc'

interfaces.name: getExhibitDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific exhibit, including era, country, gallery location, and estimated visit time.

parameters.name: exhibit_id
parameters.description: ID of the Exhibit to display

interfaces.name: addExhibitToRoute
interfaces.description: Add an exhibit as a stop in the user's self-guided route, creating the route if it does not exist.

parameters.name: exhibit_id
parameters.description: ID of the Exhibit to add to the route

interfaces.name: getRouteOverview
interfaces.description: Get the self-guided tour / My Route overview including ordered stops, exhibit details, and a calculated schedule if a start time is set.

scheduled_start_time.description: Calculated start time at this stop, HH:MM, if route.start_time is set

scheduled_end_time.description: Calculated end time at this stop, HH:MM, if route.start_time is set

interfaces.name: updateRouteSettingsAndSchedule
interfaces.description: Update self-guided route settings such as start time and optimization preferences, then recalculate the schedule.

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Planned route start time, HH:MM (e.g., '10:00')

parameters.name: optimize_for_duration
parameters.description: If true, optimize stop order to minimize total duration

parameters.name: max_total_duration_minutes
parameters.description: Maximum allowed total duration (visit + walking) in minutes, e.g., 90

interfaces.name: reorderRouteStops
interfaces.description: Reorder the stops in the self-guided route by providing the new ordered list of RouteStop IDs.

parameters.name: ordered_route_stop_ids
parameters.description: Array of RouteStop IDs in the desired order (index is new order_index)

interfaces.name: removeRouteStop
interfaces.description: Remove a specific stop from the self-guided route.

parameters.name: route_stop_id
parameters.description: ID of the RouteStop to remove

interfaces.name: getProgramFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for Tours & Workshops, including languages, months, audience types, and price ranges.

interfaces.name: listGuidedTours
interfaces.description: List guided tours based on filters such as date, language, and price, with optional sorting by duration.

date.description: Filter tours that have sessions on this date, 'YYYY-MM-DD'

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sorting for tours, e.g., 'duration_desc', 'duration_asc', 'price_asc'

interfaces.name: listWorkshops
interfaces.description: List workshops based on filters such as month, weekend-only, audience type, and maximum price.

weekends_only.description: If true, return only sessions marked is_weekend = true

sample_weekend_morning_session.description: Example weekend morning session if available

interfaces.name: getProgramDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific guided tour or workshop, including available sessions.

parameters.name: program_id
parameters.description: ID of the Program (tour or workshop)

interfaces.name: createProgramBooking
interfaces.description: Create a pending booking for a selected tour or workshop session with participant counts, used for the booking review page.

parameters.name: program_id
parameters.description: ID of the Program being booked

parameters.name: session_id
parameters.description: ID of the selected ProgramSession

parameters.name: adult_count
parameters.description: Number of adult participants

parameters.name: child_count
parameters.description: Number of child participants

parameters.name: senior_count
parameters.description: Number of senior participants

parameters.name: group_name
parameters.description: Group or contact name, used primarily for workshops (e.g., 'Taylor Family')

parameters.name: add_to_cart
parameters.description: If true, immediately add this booking as a cart item; otherwise keep as pending for review

interfaces.name: getProgramBookingReview
interfaces.description: Get a booking review summary for a pending tour or workshop booking, including program, session, participants, and pricing.

parameters.name: booking_id
parameters.description: ID of the ProgramBooking to review

interfaces.name: finalizeProgramBooking
interfaces.description: Confirm a pending program booking and optionally add it to the cart.

parameters.name: booking_id
parameters.description: ID of the ProgramBooking to confirm

parameters.name: add_to_cart
parameters.description: If true, add the confirmed booking into the unified cart

interfaces.name: getLearnPageContent
interfaces.description: Get overview content for the Learn & Articles page, including highlighted topics and featured articles.

interfaces.name: getArticleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filters for articles including topics, time period presets, and reading time options.

interfaces.name: listArticles
interfaces.description: List educational articles based on topic, time period, and reading time filters.

is_published_only.description: If true, return only published articles

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sorting key, e.g., 'publish_date_desc', 'reading_time_asc'

interfaces.name: getArticleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific article and whether it is in the user's reading list.

parameters.name: article_id
parameters.description: ID of the Article to display

interfaces.name: addArticleToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add an article to the user's personal reading list (My Reading List), creating the list if needed.

parameters.name: article_id
parameters.description: ID of the Article to save

interfaces.name: removeArticleFromReadingList
interfaces.description: Remove an article from the user's personal reading list.

parameters.name: article_id
parameters.description: ID of the Article to remove from the reading list

interfaces.name: getReadingList
interfaces.description: Get the user's personal reading list including articles and their metadata.

interfaces.name: getTimelineConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration data for the interactive timeline, including global min/max years and era presets for the slider.

interfaces.name: listTimelineEvents
interfaces.description: List timeline events within a specified year range and optional filters for display on the interactive timeline.

parameters.name: start_year
parameters.description: Inclusive start year for the visible range (negative for BCE, e.g., -2500)

parameters.name: end_year
parameters.description: Inclusive end year for the visible range (e.g., 1, 1950)

parameters.name: region
parameters.description: Optional region filter, e.g., 'europe'

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: Optional category filter, e.g., 'technology', 'trade'

interfaces.name: pinTimelineEvent
interfaces.description: Pin a timeline event to the user's personal timeline (My Timeline).

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: ID of the TimelineEvent to pin

interfaces.name: getPinnedTimelineEvents
interfaces.description: Get the user's pinned timeline events in chronological order for the My Timeline view.

interfaces.name: getShopCategories
interfaces.description: Get high-level shop categories for navigation on the Shop page.

interfaces.name: getBookFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Books category, including formats, topics, rating thresholds, and price ranges.

interfaces.name: listBooks
interfaces.description: List book products in the shop with filters for format, topic, rating, and price.

parameters.name: sort_by
parameters.description: Sorting key, e.g., 'price_asc', 'rating_desc'

interfaces.name: addProductToCart
interfaces.description: Add a shop product (such as a book) to the single-user cart, creating the cart if needed.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: ID of the Product to add

parameters.name: quantity
parameters.description: Quantity to add

interfaces.name: getNewsletterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available newsletter interests, frequency options, and language options for the Newsletter Sign-Up page.

interfaces.name: subscribeToNewsletter
interfaces.description: Create a newsletter subscription with email, language, frequency, and selected interests.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Subscriber email address

parameters.name: preferred_language
parameters.description: Preferred language code, e.g., 'english'

parameters.name: frequency
parameters.description: Frequency code, e.g., 'monthly_digest'

parameters.name: interest_codes
parameters.description: Array of interest codes such as 'ancient_cheese_history', 'museum_events_workshops'

interfaces.name: updateNewsletterPreferences
interfaces.description: Update or confirm newsletter subscription preferences during an optional follow-up step.

parameters.name: frequency
parameters.description: Updated frequency code, e.g., 'monthly_digest'

parameters.name: interest_codes
parameters.description: Updated list of interest codes; if omitted, keep existing interests

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About the Museum page including mission, history, and key collections.

interfaces.name: getContactInfo
interfaces.description: Get contact details and basic directions for the Contact page.

interfaces.name: submitContactForm
interfaces.description: Submit a contact form with visitor questions, feedback, or special requests.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Sender's name

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: Sender's email address

parameters.name: subject
parameters.description: Subject of the message

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message content

interfaces.name: getPoliciesContent
interfaces.description: Get policy sections for the Policies page including privacy, terms, ticketing, and shop policies.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the current Cart for the single user or create a new one if none exists, and persist it.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate subtotal, shipping_total, and total on the Cart based on CartItems and selected ShippingOption.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateRoute
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or initialize the SelfGuidedRoute and its RouteStops for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateRouteSchedule
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recompute scheduled_start_time and scheduled_end_time for RouteStops based on route start_time and walking times.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateReadingList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the ReadingList entity for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateNewsletterSubscription
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to create or load the NewsletterSubscription associated with the current email for the single user.

helperFunctions.name: _getPinnedTimelineCollection
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load all PinnedTimelineEvent records for the single user, ordered by sort_order or event year.
